title: microsorum superficiale var. australiense
intro: Microsorum superficiale var. australiense, also known as Australasian Microsorum, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique growth habit. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Microsorum superficiale var. australiense are typically dried and used as an infusion, or made into a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
